name: Alligator Sauce Piquant-2
recipeIngredient: 5 Pounds alligator meat, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the alligator cubes until they are tender.
2. In a separate pan, make a roux by cooking oil and flour over low heat until medium brown. Alternatively, you can use 1 small canned tomato paste as a substitute for the roux mixture.
3. Add cold water to the roux, followed by the remaining ingredients (whole tomatoes, mushrooms, celery, green onions, bell pepper, tomato sauce, chopped onions, garlic, parsley, and cayenne pepper) and the cooked alligator.
4. Simmer for approximately 1 hour.
5. Serve over cooked rice.
